answers.label: At a desk — in an office or from home
Mostly on my own — I focus better independently
Steady and methodical — I like planning carefully

milestones.title: Certification
milestones.description: (Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in software analyst to build a strong learning foundation

resources.title: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate on Coursera
Business Analysis Professional Certificate (University of Toronto) on Coursera
The Complete SQL Bootcamp 2024: Go from Zero to Hero on Udemy
Agile Crash Course: Agile Project Management; Agile Delivery; Scrum on Udemy
AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials (Amazon Web Services) on Coursera

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in requirements gathering, business process analysis, and use case documentation — these are the essential building blocks for a software analyst

resources.title: W3Schools SQL Tutorial
freeCodeCamp Scientific Computing with Python Certification
Udemy Courses on Microsoft Excel
Coursera Courses on Business Analysis
edX Courses on Agile Software Development

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in agile and scrum methodologies, uml diagrams, and stakeholder communication, applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: IBM Data Analyst Professional Certificate (Coursera)
Python for Data Analysis and Automation (Udemy Topic)
Business Intelligence Tools and Advanced Analytics (Udemy Topic)
AWS Training and Certification for Data Analytics
Scientific Computing with Python Certification (freeCodeCamp)

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing data analysis projects, research studies, or analytical reports using real-world datasets — focus on applying requirements gathering, and business process analysis in realistic scenarios

resources.title: SQL Tutorial for Beginners (Interactive)
Pandas Official Documentation & User Guide
Atlassian Jira Software Documentation & Tutorials
Tableau Public Learning Resources & Tutorials
Unified Modeling Language (UML) Complete Guide

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a portfolio of analytical projects: publish notebooks on Kaggle or GitHub, create data visualizations, and document your methodology and findings

resources.title: GitHub for Hosting and Showcasing Software Projects
Coursera Data Science & Analytics Learning Path
freeCodeCamp Data Analysis with Python Certification
GeeksforGeeks - Data Science Project Ideas and Tutorials
freeCodeCamp.org YouTube Channel (Project-Based Tutorials)

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your software analyst skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

resources.title: Coursera: Professional Resume and CV Writing Courses
Udemy: LinkedIn Profile Optimization Courses
GitHub Docs: Getting Started with Git and GitHub (for Project Portfolios)
GeeksforGeeks: Career Advice and Interview Preparation
YouTube: Career Advice and Job Interview Preparation

milestones.title: Job Application / Freelancing
milestones.description: Apply for software analyst positions through job boards, company career pages, professional networks, and industry-specific platforms — tailor each application and prepare to discuss your hands-on experience and portfolio in interviews
